title: Cronos Group (CRON) Stock Investors Activity & Sentiment - TipRanks.com
text: Cronos Group (CRON) investor activity and sentiment analysis. TSE:CRON investor sentiment is neutral. Only 0.6% of TipRanks retail investors changed their holding of TSE:CRON in the last 7 days. Retail investor sentiment appears mixed, with neutral baseline but significant bearish positioning and technical weakness. About 61% of Cronos investor base is looking to short the stock. Analysis of overall sentiment suggests many investors are alarmed at this time. The Cronos Group Inc stock holds sell signals from both short and long-term Moving Averages, giving negative forecast. Analysts' consensus price target suggests estimated downside from current price levels.
